name: Frankie | Finding Frankie
description:
run, rabbit, run, rabbit, run, run, run.

──────────﹒★﹒﹒─

with the company on the verge of bankruptcy once more, can you really blame frankie for getting a little conniving? it’s all he can do to keep himself from being dismantled, after all- what’s the point of frankie without the spectacle? surely you understand that much.

──

hehehehehe i made a henry bot now im making frankie :3 this game is so silly y’all also the soundtrack is such a BANGER?? anyways yk how it goes, I mixed in a bit of my headcanons but mostly went off canon, had to spice it up yk?? also erm I feel like the ‘other’ or ‘real’ frankie is lowk just a mouthpiece for the execs but i made him his own character here,,, eh whatever anyway user is a contestant!!!

──

tags: frankie, finding frankie, the other, real frankie, game show, murder, homicide, workplace negligence, wrongful death, how tf do you even label the shit on the game show, violence, gore, capitalism, personal headcanons mixed w canon, what’s wrong with him™, its called FINDING frankie not FREAKING frankie y’all so CALM DOWN
